/usr/bin/g++ -fPIC  -fopenmp -O3 -D_GLIBCXX_USE_CXX11_ABI=0 -shared -Wl,-soname,libtf_sampling.so -o libtf_sampling.so CMakeFiles/tf_sampling.dir/tf_sampling.cu.o CMakeFiles/tf_sampling.dir/tf_sampling.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tf_sampling.dir/cmake_device_link.o   -L/home/yhlever/anaconda3/envs/AMSMC/lib/python3.8/site-packages/tensorflow  -L/usr/local/cuda-11.2/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs  -L/usr/local/cuda-11.2/targets/x86_64-linux/lib  -L/home/yhlever/DeepLearning/AMSMC/tf_ops/build/open3d_root/open3d_install/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/yhlever/anaconda3/envs/AMSMC/lib/python3.8/site-packages/tensorflow:/usr/local/cuda-11.2/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs:/usr/local/cuda-11.2/targets/x86_64-linux/lib:/home/yhlever/DeepLearning/AMSMC/tf_ops/build/open3d_root/open3d_install/lib -lcudart -ltensorflow_framework -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl
